title: chargeback — product analytics

events.name: Chargeback Filed
events.description: Every chargeback filed. P0 event. Essential consent — financial-integrity signals cannot be opted out. days_since_payment_bucket: 0-30 / 31-60 / 61-90 / 91-120 / 120+; amount_bucket: 0-999 / 1000-4999 / 5000-19999 / 20000+.

events.name: Chargeback Evidence Requested
events.description: Fires when the bank requests evidence (initial or CE3.0 second pass).

events.name: Chargeback Evidence Submitted
events.description: hours_before_deadline_bucket: 0-24 / 24-72 / 72-168 (1 week) / 168+. Powers evidence-submission SLA monitoring. Late-submitters (< 24h before deadline) surface as ops risk.

events.name: Chargeback Won
events.description: P1 event. days_to_decision_bucket: 0-7 / 8-30 / 31-60 / 61-90 / 91+. Powers win-rate + evidence-effectiveness analysis. had_ce3_evidence=true correlates with high win rate for Visa fraud disputes.

events.name: Chargeback Lost
events.description: P1 event — every fire is a financial loss. fee_bucket: 0-999 / 1000-1999 / 2000-2999 / 3000+. was_expired=true means auto-loss via missed evidence deadline (distinct signal from bank-decided loss).

events.name: Chargeback Expired
events.description: Distinct from Chargeback Lost — auto-loss via missed evidence deadline. Powers evidence-submission-completeness monitoring.

events.name: Chargeback Accepted Refund
events.description: RDR path. rdr_threshold_bucket: 0-999 / 1000-2499 / 2500-4999 / 5000+ (in cents). Powers RDR-cost-effectiveness analysis.

events.name: Chargeback Clawback Referral
events.description: P1 event — every fire is a downstream reward reversal impacting referrer credits.

events.name: Chargeback Clawback Coupon
events.description: P1 event — every fire is a downstream coupon usage-count decrement.

events.name: Chargeback Reconciled
events.description: drift_detected=true fires a P2 signal. Powers reconciliation-loop-quality dashboards.

events.name: Chargeback Rate Threshold Exceeded
events.description: P1 event — merchant-account termination risk. Powers merchant-account risk monitoring dashboards for Stackra platform ops.

events.name: Chargeback Manually Marked Lost
events.description: Admin escape hatch — force-fail path. state_at_mark_lost IN ('pending_evidence', 'evidence_submitted', 'under_bank_review').

notes: Amount + fee buckets are pre-computed bins (0-999 / 1000-4999 / etc.). Never raw amounts — prevents competitor cross-inference of chargeback-worthy tenant revenue.

Every ChargebackFiled / ChargebackLost / ChargebackWon / ChargebackAcceptedRefund / ChargebackClawbackReferral / ChargebackClawbackCoupon / ChargebackRateThresholdExceeded is `essential` consent tier — financial-integrity signals cannot be opted out. Reconcile events are `functional` (opt-outable).
Provider-quality dashboards read reason_code + reason_category for per-provider dispute-defense-effectiveness trending.

Marketing events (ad-network fraud signal + negative-value conversion) are NOT here — they live on the marketing lane at /modules/finance/blueprints/chargeback/marketing.json with the `advertising` consent tier. ChargebackLost fires BOTH the analytics event (essential) + the marketing event (advertising).
had_ce3_evidence property on Chargeback Won correlates with dramatically higher win rates for eligible Visa fraud disputes (typical 70-85% vs 15-25% baseline).
